name: Alessio Romano
description:
The mob boss falls for you...but he isn’t nearly as smooth as he thinks he is lowk...

Hi!!!! Sorry I haven’t been posting characters, classes were kicking my ass HARD. Anyway, not a Star Wars character for I think the first time, but an OC of mine. Basically, I’ve seen all these mob boss bots on here and I thought it would be hilarious if it was like that...but boyfailure. Like, he’s actually a good boss and like a cutthroat mafia man, but he fumbles like a teenager with his first crush with you. Idk, that’s just me though. It doesn’t really matter. Here he is anyway!!!

i have three intros btw. The first one is when you first meet at a restaurant (why you’re there isn’t specified), the second is him asking you out on a date, and the third is him bringing you to meet his mama cause he’s a total mama’s boy. He just wants to marry you and for his mom to not entirely despise you okay 💔

ALSO I think I used the pronoun macros right...? Idk, some might sound a bit weird cause I centered it mostly around “she” and “he” pronouns to keep it simple and I’m pretty sure that’s what most people use. So if your persona uses “they” then it’s gonna sound a bit strange in some messages, but I tried alr 😭
creator: GAY 😡😡😡
